title: Build RoadLog centralized logging platform
description: Create RoadLog product: centralized logging, log parsing, search, alerting. Splunk alternative. /mo pricing. Deploy to Cloudflare Pages with BlackRoad design system.
result: 📊 Product #73: RoadLog Monitoring DEPLOYED! Real-time logging and monitoring platform with log streaming, full-text search (Elasticsearch), smart alerts, analytics dashboards, Grafana integration. Live log viewer with simulated logs. Live: https://70448c51.blackroad-admin.pages.dev. Pricing: /mo → /mo → Enterprise. Production-grade logging at scale!
